summary: Iteration 182 e2e frontend testing: App.js route-registry refactor + per-client Comms Timeline/Checklist/Vault with auto-tick from e-sign workflow. ALL critical features verified end-to-end. 100% success.

issues: Recharts warning: container width(-1)/height(-1) during initial render (cosmetic, charts still render correctly)
A few 404 console errors on static resources during load (route still renders status 200 with no UI error boundary)

critical_code_review_comments: commsLedger.js is clean, well-scoped, localStorage-based with a custom 'comms-ledger-changed' event and proper React re-render wiring via tick counter — good pattern.
DocuSignMock.jsx repeats docType inference (envelope.docName -> SOA/ROA/FDS/etc.) twice in advance(). Consider extracting to a helper to keep DRY.
ClientCommsTimeline.jsx 'Returned & Signed' checkbox is disabled unless sent, which matches spec — UX is correct.
AppRouter.jsx is now the single source of truth — clean extraction, all routes intact.
test_credentials: No auth — localStorage only (wealth_command_compliance_v5='permanent', app_mode='adviser', selected_client={id:'thompson_family'})
seed_data_creation: Cleared localStorage keys client_comms_ledger_v1, client_vault_v1, crm_docusign_envelopes before each scenario as instructed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 features verified: (a) App.js refactor — 7 routes (/dashboard /adviser-hub /retirement-confidence /advisor-command-center /investments /budget /notifications) all return 200 with no error boundaries. (b) Comms & Vault tab (data-testid=client-tab-comms) renders on dashboard in adviser+client-selected mode with 3 sub-tabs (ct-tab-checklist, ct-tab-timeline, ct-tab-vault) and all 6 REQUIRED_DOCS rows (FSG/SOA/ROA/FDS/AnnualReview/OpIn). (c) AUTO-TICK WORKFLOW VERIFIED END-TO-END: sending SOA envelope via /adviser-hub → E-Signatures → New Envelope (recipient=Thompson) → Send for Signature populates client_comms_ledger_v1 with a doc_sent event and auto-checks chk-sent-SOA on Comms & Vault tab. Clicking btn-view-* then btn-sign-* in e-sig table auto-checks chk-signed-SOA, adds vault entry with 0x signature hash (listVault), and creates timeline-doc_viewed + timeline-doc_signed events. Manual Mark sent / Mark signed on FSG also works (both checkboxes ticked). Top-level tabs present: overview, retirement, investments, budget, goals, tax, comms, invoicing — all 8 data-testid=client-tab-* confirmed. No console errors blocking functionality — only Recharts width(-1) warnings (pre-existing cosmetic) and a few /budget 404s on static resources (route still renders).
rca of the issue: No bugs found — feature implementation is correct and matches spec.
